# Test that tools can be installed with coverage

# Run mcpdiff help to ensure it's installed
exec mcpdiff --help
stderr 'Usage: mcpdiff'

# Test that mcpdiff actually works
exec mcpdiff file1.mcp file2.mcp
stdout 'Files match exactly!'

-- file1.mcp --
mcp-send {"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"test"}

-- file2.mcp --
mcp-send {"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"test"}
